name: Polyrhythm Customs
description: Observe three rhythm lanes separately, then reproduce their combined interleaved taps, holds, and chord through real key or pointer input.
natural_language: Inspect each lane separately. Then perform the combined clearance on A, S, and D.

metadata.notes: Three original lane scores are previewed one at a time and sealed before a combined real keydown/keyup performance with explicit humane timing tolerances.
